author: Haroen Viaene
subject: fix(url): treat insideBoundingBox in float form  as number (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#554)
body:
fixes algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#553

There's two representation of insideBoundingBox, one is
`'47.3165,4.9665,47.3424,5.0201'`, the other is `[[47.3165, 4.9665,
47.3424, 5.0201], [40.9234, 2.1185, 38.6430, 1.9916]]`. If URLSync was
used with the second form, it would be parsed as `[ ["51.1241999",
"9.662499900000057", "41.3253001", "-5.559099999999944"] ]` instead of
the original array of array of floats.

This commit adds special handling for this kind of shape to the
`_parseNumbers` of `SearchParameters`
